description: Known AI provider-cost gaps allowed temporarily after Phase 3.9. Member image, music, and video are intentionally excluded because they are gateway-migrated.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker text/image/embeddings routes are service-only; Phase 4.7 validates supplied caller-policy metadata and Phase 4.8.1 supplies admin text/embeddings metadata plus caller-side durable idempotency, but missing caller-policy remains allowed for other known callers to avoid changing org/member behavior.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Internal routes are not public and missing caller-policy metadata remains baseline_allowed for remaining known callers until each caller is migrated.
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: caller route budget kill switch required
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: A later targeted migration should require caller-supplied budget policy metadata for remaining internal text/image/embeddings callers and keep the routes service-only; admin text/embeddings already carry Phase 4.8.1 metadata, caller-side durable idempotency, Admin Image branches are classified by Phase 4.14, and Phase 4.15 runtime budget switches now protect already budget-classified admin/platform callers.

knownGaps.reason: Internal AI Worker music/video/compare routes are service-only; Phase 4.7 validates supplied caller-policy metadata and requires it for async video task create/poll. Phase 4.9 supplies admin music caller metadata, Phase 4.10 supplies admin compare caller metadata, Phase 4.12 requires Admin Live-Agent caller metadata, and Phase 4.13 retires the Auth Worker sync video debug caller as disabled-by-default. Broader internal baseline routes remain caller-migration gaps for other known service-only callers.
knownGaps.temporaryAllowanceReason: Internal routes are not public and Phase 4.7 classifies missing caller-policy metadata as baseline_allowed for known broad admin/debug routes until each remaining caller is migrated; the Auth Worker sync video debug caller is retired/disabled-by-default rather than treated as a normal provider-cost gap.
knownGaps.killSwitchTarget: caller route budget kill switch required
knownGaps.futureEnforcementPath: Later targeted migrations should require caller-supplied budget policy metadata for any remaining internal music/video/compare callers while keeping unrelated internal routes service-only and baseline-compatible until their own migrations; Phase 4.15 runtime budget switches now protect already budget-classified admin/platform callers.
